[observation] [info] High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
[observation] [info] Add integration-style tests that exercise config resolution and entrypoint wiring, not just `help.js`, to catch regressions early.
[observation] [info] Capture the initialization flow from `config.js` into developer docs to make onboarding easier as additional entrypoints are added.
[observation] [info] Extract a common CLI bootstrap helper that each of `ci.js`, `cli.js`, and `web.js` can call so option definitions never drift.

<insights>

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
- Deduplicate argument parsing and logging glue across `ci.js`, `cli.js`, and `web.js` so every surface exposes the same flags.
- Extend tests beyond `tests/unit/help.test.js` to cover config bootstrapping and CLI-to-config wiring.
- Document how `config.js` is loaded per surface to reduce tribal knowledge when new entrypoints appear.
- Extract a common CLI bootstrap helper that each of `ci.js`, `cli.js`, and `web.js` can call so option definitions never drift.
- Add integration-style tests that exercise config resolution and entrypoint wiring, not just `help.js`, to catch regressions early.
- Capture the initialization flow from `config.js` into developer docs to make onboarding easier as additional entrypoints are added.
